{{Infobox book
| name = Of Killers and Kings
| slug = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
| precedes = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
| follows = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
| cover = [[File:Cover-ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings.jpg|250px]]
}}

== Plot summary ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The story begins with a failed ritual by the [[Sleepless cult]], led by [[Tarik]], to summon the [[Chasm Mouth]]; the ritual succeeds but results in the death of the cultists at the hands of mysterious attackers, leaving [[Tarik]] to be captured by a masked stranger. In the present day, [[Shera]], the [[Mistress of the Mists]] and [[Guild Head]] of the [[Consultants]], works with High [[Councilors]] [[Kerian]] and [[Yala]] to navigate political tensions between [[Imperialists]] and [[Independent Guilds]]. This era is haunted by the legacy of [[the Emperor]], who seventeen hundred and eighty years ago bound himself to the heart of the dying [[Great Elder]] [[Nakothi]] to achieve immortality, leaving behind a plan for his partner, [[Estyr Six]].

Political instability peaks during peace negotiations at the [[Rose Tower]]. After [[Shera]] accepts a dangerous augmentation elixirs{{!}}elixir from [[Nathanael Bareius]], the summit collapses into violence when [[Regent]] [[Estyr Six]] discovers a slave mark on [[Calder Marten]], identifying him as a servant to the Elder [[Kelarac]]. Amidst the chaos, [[Shera]] secures [[Estyr's Vessels]], but a massive explosion leaves the [[Regent]] critically wounded. Meanwhile, [[Lucan]], an investigator, uncovers historical secrets suggesting the [[Mistress of the Mists]] may have been a [[Regent]], and discovers that the sleeping [[Regents]] are being held in coffins rather than serving as weapons.

A series of flashbacks reveals that two years prior, [[Lucan]] and [[Shera]] attempted to release the [[Regents]] from their tombs. This mission was a trap set by [[Yala]], who had withheld the [[Regents]] to protect The Empire{{!}}the Empire from their potential desire to dismantle the [[Guilds]]. The infiltration went wrong, resulting in heavy casualties and a system purge that accidentally awakened [[Estyr Six]]. In the aftermath of the awakening, the [[Regents]] confront [[Yala]] about [[the Emperor]]'s death and the state of the world. Amidst this, the [[Sleepless cult]] continues its machinations; [[Jyrine Tessella Marten]] escapes custody and releases the [[Great Elder]] Urg’naut{{!}}Urg'naut by offering a [[Heart of Nakothi]].

The conflict escalates as Urg’naut{{!}}Urg'naut manifests through [[Darius Allbright]], devastating the Capital and shattering the sky. To defend the city, [[Shera]] implements a high-risk [[Soulbinding]] process for her [[Gardeners]], creating a new generation of [[Soulbound]]. Following Urg’naut{{!}}Urg'naut's departure to battle an entity known as the [[Outsider]], a new threat emerges: the [[Great Elder]] [[Kelarac]]. [[Loreli]], the [[Regent of the West]], joins forces with [[Shera]] and a restored [[Estyr]] to intercept [[Kelarac]] at sea.

In the final confrontation, [[Bareius]] attempts to sabotage the defense, but [[Shera]] and [[Yala]] thwart him. [[Kelarac]] possesses Jyrine Tessella Marten{{!}}Jyrine Marten to attack [[Calder]], but [[Shera]] manages to kill the [[Great Elder]]. However, the victory is short-lived as the corpse of [[Nakothi]] rises from the sea. Rejecting [[Kelarac]]'s temptations, [[Shera]] uses his power to summon a massive onslaught of [[Awakened weapons]], which, alongside the [[Regents]]' efforts, finally destroys [[Nakothi]]. Five years after these cataclysmic events, [[Shera]] completes her duties and joins the other [[Regents]] in a deep sleep within their coffins, intending to return to her role as [[Regent of the East]] in two years.}}

== Chapter-by-chapter ==
* '''Chapter 1:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tarik]] and five members of the [[Sleepless cult]] perform a ritual in an abandoned conservatory, using a baby Leafcrawler and bloodstained mirrors to summon the [[Chasm Mouth]]. The ritual successfully summons the massive worm, but mysterious figures emerge from a thick mist to attack and kill the cult members. After finding his companions gone and the worm dead, [[Tarik]] is confronted by a masked stranger in gray who orders him to be captured.}}
* '''Chapter 2:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]], the newly appointed [[Mistress of the Mists]] and [[Guild Head]] of the [[Consultants]], meets with High [[Councilors]] [[Kerian]] and [[Yala]] to prepare for an upcoming summit. They travel to the [[Rainworth Imperial Library]], which serves as their new headquarters, to meet with [[Regents]] [[Estyr]] and [[Loreli]]. During a private meeting, the group discusses a peace overture from the [[Imperialists]] and strategizes on how to handle the growing threat of the [[Sleepless]] cults and the [[Great Elders]].}}
* '''Chapter 3:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Set seventeen hundred and eighty years ago, [[the Emperor]] and his partner [[Estyr Six]] hover above a landscape devastated by the death throes of the [[Great Elder]], [[Nakothi]]. To ensure humanity can survive the eventual return of the [[Elders]], [[the Emperor]] reveals his plan to bind himself to [[Nakothi's heart]] to achieve immortality and rule an undying empire. Although [[Estyr]] expresses skepticism toward his methods, she pledges her loyalty to him before flying away, leaving [[the Emperor]] to secretly plot how he might eventually grant her immortality as well.}}
* '''Chapter 4:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]], [[Meia]], and [[Darius]] discuss the logistical and security risks of an upcoming high-stakes meeting between Imperialist and [[Independent Guilds]], ultimately proposing that all participants disarm to prevent a bloodbath. On the morning of the meeting, [[Shera]] intervenes in a standoff between her pseudo-[[Gardeners]] and [[Nathanael Bareius]]'s Alchemists{{!}}alchemists before meeting him privately. During their meeting, [[Bareius]] offers [[Shera]] a rare augmentation elixirs{{!}}elixir that grants temporary [[Champion]]-like abilities, which she accepts only after [[Ayana]]'s violent intervention forces him to yield the jar.}}
* '''Chapter 5:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Five years after [[the Emperor]]'s death, [[Shera]] leads a team of [[Consultants]] to peacefully disperse a mob besieging the mansion of [[Alberrett Kingson]] using alchemical smoke. The mission turns violent when a pack of scavengers arrives and begins murdering the unconscious rioters, forcing [[Shera]] to signal her team for combat. After a bloody skirmish leaves [[Shera]] wounded, she and her partner [[Lucan]] prepare to depart the chaotic Capital.}}
* '''Chapter 6:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] and the [[Independent Guilds]] arrive at the [[Rose Tower]] to negotiate peace with the [[Imperialists]], a process that requires all participants to surrender their weapons and [[Vessels]]. During the formal debate, [[Regent]] [[Estyr Six]] discovers a mark on [[Calder Marten]]'s arm identifying him as a slave to the Elder [[Kelarac]]. The negotiations instantly collapse into violence as [[Estyr]] attacks [[Calder]] and his protectors, revealing that the peace talks were compromised from the start.}}
* '''Chapter 7:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Two thousand years ago, the [[Mistress of the Mists]] used her position and the power of [[Bastion's Veil]] to negotiate with a mutated delegate from [[Othaghor]], ultimately agreeing to provide military support in exchange for payment. In the present day, a man named [[Lucan]] investigates historical fragments and artifacts to uncover the connection between the Consultants' Guild{{!}}Consultant Guild Head and the legendary [[Regents]]. He suspects that the [[Mistress of the Mists]] may have been a [[Regent]], a discovery that could potentially destabilize the current power of the High [[Council]].}}
* '''Chapter 8:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|During a chaotic battle at the [[Rose Tower]], [[Shera]] uses an alchemical potion to fight through [[Imperial]] guards and [[Magisters]] to retrieve [[Estyr's Vessels]]. After successfully securing the items, a massive explosion caused by [[Kern]] and [[Jorin]]'s corrupted blade leaves [[Estyr Six]] critically wounded and the streets in ruins. [[Shera]] uses her [[Vessel]]'s power to create a protective mist, allowing her and the survivors to retreat into the tunnels with the dying [[Regent]].}}
* '''Chapter 9:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Three years after [[the Emperor]]'s death, [[Lucan]] continues his private research into the [[Architects]]' motivations, eventually visiting [[Mason Zhen]] to seek help in the tunnels. Using his abilities as a Reader, [[Lucan]] discovers a sealed room containing four coffins and realizes they hold the sleeping [[Regents]] rather than mere weapons. After [[Zhen]] realizes the gravity of the discovery, [[Lucan]] agrees to keep the secret for now while planning to confront [[Yala]].}}
* '''Chapter 10:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|After [[Shera]] and [[Jorin]] successfully use a specialized chain and alchemical needles to restrain the [[Regent]] [[Estyr]], whose powers have spiraled out of control, they struggle with her unconscious state and the need for medical help. Meanwhile, [[Shera]] endures a frustrating meeting with various [[Guild Heads]] who bicker over political and financial strategies rather than presenting a unified front. Exhausted and ill from the [[Champion potion]], [[Shera]] eventually gathers her [[Gardeners]] to prepare for an inevitable conflict against the influence of the [[Great Elders]].}}
* '''Chapter 11:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Two years prior to the current timeline, [[Lucan]] holds a secret meeting with [[Yala]] to confront her about why the [[Regents]] were not released as [[the Emperor]] had intended. Through a series of objects imbued with [[Intent]], [[Lucan]] discovers that the [[Regents]] actually planned to dismantle the [[Guilds]], providing [[Yala]] and the High [[Council]] with a motive to keep them contained. [[Yala]] explains that they withheld the [[Regents]] to protect the [[Guilds]] and The Empire{{!}}the Empire, intending to release them only as warriors against ancient threats rather than as rulers.}}
* '''Chapter 12:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The chapter follows several [[Champions]] facing different fates: [[Interion Darovish]] launches a violent raid on the [[Luminian Order]] before falling victim to an alchemical trap and assassination; [[Oleana]] seeks leisure after a brutal combat session but is incapacitated by poisoned needles; and [[Trip]], a [[Champion]] enjoying newfound peace, dies mysteriously in his sleep. Meanwhile, an injured [[Yzara]] boards a ship to return home to [[Izyria]], hoping to leave the conflicts of the [[Guilds]] behind.}}
* '''Chapter 13:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Two years prior to the main timeline, [[Lucan]] and [[Shera]] row through Bastion's Veil{{!}}Bastion’s Veil to discuss the potential threat posed by the [[Regents]]. While [[Lucan]] fears the [[Regents]] will undermine the [[Guilds]] and seize power, [[Shera]] argues that they should honor [[the Emperor]]'s decision to leave the world in their care. Ultimately, [[Lucan]] concedes to [[Shera]]'s logic and agrees that they must figure out how to open the coffins.}}
* '''Chapter 14:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] executes a multi-phase plan to assassinate [[Calder Marten]], but her primary attempt fails when she discovers the man she attacks is a body double wearing fake armor. After realizing her backup route is also compromised and she is being hunted, [[Shera]] is forced to abandon her prepared strategies. The chapter concludes with [[Shera]] resorting to her emergency plan, using [[Bastion's Veil]] to swallow [[the Emperor]]'s Stage.}}
* '''Chapter 15:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Two years ago, [[Shera]] and [[Lucan]] infiltrated [[Zhen]]'s home to release the [[Regents]], successfully bypassing guards and mechanical traps. After incapacitating [[Zhen]] with a non-lethal needle to avoid hurting him, they discovered the mission was a trap when hidden [[Consultants]] opened fire. The chapter ends with both [[Shera]] and [[Lucan]] suffering severe gunshot wounds as they realize [[Yala]] has broken the [[Guild]]'s unspoken rules of engagement.}}
* '''Chapter 16:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|After her stealthy infiltration fails, [[Shera]] uses her [[Soulbound]] power to create a protective mist while attempting to evade [[Imperial Guards]] and two powerful [[Champions]]. Despite being cornered and wounded, she manages to absorb the energy of her attackers and fellow guards to bolster her strength. Ultimately, [[Shera]] uses a specialized weapon to pierce the [[Emperor's armor]] and assassinate [[Calder Marten]] before fleeing to reunite with her allies, [[Meia]] and [[Jorin]].}}
* '''Chapter 17:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|After a violent confrontation in the [[Mason house]], [[Yala]] discovers that the traitorous [[Consultants]] [[Lucan]] and [[Shera]] have inadvertently triggered a failsafe in the underground tombs. The gas bomb released by [[Shera]] bypasses alchemical filters, causing a system purge that awakens the legendary [[Regent]], [[Estyr Six]]. As the powerful [[Soulbound]] rises from her coffin, she confronts [[Yala]] and demands to know [[the Emperor]]'s whereabouts.}}
* '''Chapter 18:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Following [[Jorin]]'s arrival at the [[Emperor’s Stage]], he declares an end to the [[Guild War]] and claims [[Calder]] has been taken into custody, though [[Shera]] suspects the [[Champions]] escaped with [[the Emperor]]'s corpse. Meanwhile, [[Loreli]], the [[Regent of the West]], discovers through her Reader’s senses{{!}}Reader's senses that the dark presence of [[Kelarac]] is missing from his underwater prison. Realizing a [[Great Elder]] is on the move, [[Loreli]] reveals her true identity to [[Captain Marstrom]] and his crew, securing their assistance to return to the Capital.}}
* '''Chapter 19:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|After being woken by an alchemical gas bomb, the [[Regent]] [[Estyr Six]] and her fellow [[Regents]] confront [[Yala]] regarding the death of [[the Emperor]]. While [[Loreli]] uses her healing powers to save a wounded [[Shera]] and [[Lucan]], the [[Regents]] process the news of their leader's passing and the state of The Empire{{!}}the Empire. The tension shifts from interrogation to collective grief until [[Shera]] suddenly wakes up and draws a weapon.}}
* '''Chapter 20:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] interrogates the prisoner [[Jyrine Tessella Marten]] using alchemical incense, learning that the [[Sleepless cult]] seeks to bargain with the [[Great Elders]] so they may ascend beyond the world. Following the interrogation, [[Shera]] resigns her position as [[Guild Head]] to escape political pressures and the manipulations of [[Nathanael Bareius]]. Meanwhile, [[Jyrine]] escapes custody and travels to [[Urg’naut]]’s tomb, where she releases the [[Great Elder]] by offering a [[Heart of Nakothi]], receiving a cryptic message from the Shadow{{!}}shadow in return.}}
* '''Chapter 21:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Two years prior, the four [[Regents]] meet with the [[Consultant's Guild]] leaders to announce they will divide the world into four territories rather than appointing a new Emperor. During the meeting, [[Estyr]] intervenes to prevent [[Yala]] from executing [[Shera]] and [[Lucan]] for their crimes, instead securing a sentence of shallow imprisonment. The chapter concludes with [[Shera]] and [[Lucan]] arguing about the consequences of their actions after the [[Regents]] depart.}}
* '''Chapter 22:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|After [[Regent]] [[Jorin]] destroys a building to signal the escape of Jyrine Tessella Marten{{!}}Jyrine Marten, [[Shera]] realizes that the [[Great Elder]] Urg’naut{{!}}Urg'naut is approaching the Capital. To prepare for the inevitable attack, [[Shera]] takes command of the [[Consultants]] and orders a high-risk, accelerated [[Soulbinding]] process for the [[Gardeners]]. Despite several violent failures and the loss of [[Ayana]] to her own [[Vessel]], the process yields an unprecedented number of new [[Soulbound]] just as Urg’naut{{!}}Urg'naut arrives and plunges the world into darkness.}}
* '''Chapter 23:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|As darkness falls over the Capital, [[Shera]] and her [[Soulbound Gardeners]] attempt to protect the city from the [[Great Elder]] [[Urg’naut]], who is manifesting through the body of [[Darius Allbright]]. Despite [[Jorin]]'s powerful magical intervention and [[Shera]]'s efforts to fight back, [[Urg’naut]] unleashes a devastating wave of annihilation that destroys a massive section of the city and shatters the sky. The chapter concludes with [[Urg’naut]] ascending into the void to battle a mysterious figure known as the [[Outsider]], leaving the survivors to prepare for the arrival of [[Kelarac]].}}
* '''Chapter 24:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] escapes a failing voyage on the [[Heart of the Aion]] by boarding [[Calder Marten]]'s ship, [[The Testament]], after he rescues her and her crew from the sea. Upon arriving at the Capital, [[Loreli]] and [[Shera]] reunite with a restored [[Estyr]] to coordinate a defense against the approaching [[Great Elder]], [[Kelarac]]. The leaders form a desperate plan to intercept [[Kelarac]] at sea, while [[Calder]] reveals he has been communicating with the entity in the sky.}}
* '''Chapter 25:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|As the fleet prepares to battle [[Kelarac]], [[Bareius]] attempts to sabotage [[Shera]]'s ship and seize control of the [[Consultants]], but he is thwarted by a pre-planned counter-strike from [[Shera]] and [[Yala]]. During the ensuing chaotic battle, [[Kelarac]] possesses Jyrine Tessella Marten{{!}}Jyrine Marten's body to attack [[Calder]], but [[Shera]] manages to kill the [[Great Elder]] using her [[Soulbound]] weapon. Despite this victory, a second [[Great Elder]]—the corpse of [[Nakothi]]—rises from the sea, and a mysterious, blindfolded man appears to offer [[Kelarac]]'s essence a new deal.}}
* '''Chapter 26:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|After [[Kelarac]] attempts to manipulate [[Shera]] into abandoning her allies and fleeing, [[Meia]] intervenes to challenge his influence over her. Rejecting [[Kelarac]]'s offer of safety, [[Shera]] instead uses the [[Great Elder]]'s power to summon his vast treasure [[vault]] of [[Awakened weapons]]. This massive onslaught, combined with the efforts of the [[Regents]], successfully destroys [[Nakothi]], leaving [[Shera]] to collapse from exhaustion after discarding the entity's heart.}}
* '''Chapter 27:''' {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Five years after the defeat of [[Nakothi]], [[Shera]] completes her final duties as [[Mistress of the Mists]] and prepares for a scheduled departure. After an emotional farewell with [[Meia]], [[Shera]] joins the other [[Regents]] in their respective coffins to undergo a procedure that puts them into a deep sleep. [[Shera]] settles into her new coffin, [[Regent of the East]], and falls asleep with the expectation of returning to work in two years.}}

== Characters ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jorin]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kelarac]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Emperor (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Yala]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder Marten]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bareius]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Elderspawn]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nakothi]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alagaeus]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kerian]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Ayana]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Baldezar Kern]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Benji]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Zhen]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Mistress of the Mists]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Regent]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Darius Allbright]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nathanael Bareius]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Furman]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kern]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Yzara]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jyrine]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bliss]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Dead Mother]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[General Teach]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Maxwell]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Stonefang]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Farstrider sisters]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Oleana]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Head alchemist]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Reader (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Cheska Bennett]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kthanikahr]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Teach]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tyril]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Elder of Urg’naut]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Outsider]]}}

== Locations & groups ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Regents]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion's Veil]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Imperial Palace (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Consultants]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Consultant's Guild]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Great Elders]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Gray Island]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Gardeners]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Capital (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Architects]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Council of Architects]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shepherds (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Imperial Guard]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Luminian]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Masons]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Rose Tower]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Gardener]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Witnesses (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Luminian Order]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Champions]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Magisters]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Blackwatch]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Imperialists]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Independents]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Am’haranai]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Consultant]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shepherd (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[High Council (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Aion Sea]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Independent Guilds]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[High Councilors (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Guild]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Greenwardens]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Mason]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Guild Heads]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Empire (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Elders]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Izyria]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Sleepless]]}}

== Abilities & sacred arts ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Reading]]}}

== Artifacts & constructs ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Syphren]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Soulbound Vessel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|shears}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Emperor's armor]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Testament]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Heart of Nakothi]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tyrfang]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion's Shadow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Awakened weapons]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Champion potion]]}}

== Events & concepts ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Great Elder]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Intent]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kameira]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Soulbound]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Champion]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Vessels]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Unknown God]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Vessel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Ach'magut]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Consultant blacks]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Guild War]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Elder War]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Creeping Shadow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Emperor’s Intent]]}}

{{Willverse books nav}}

[[Category:Books]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
